# Cardinal Studio

> Independent digital studio run by one technical founder (~6 years across game design, full-stack development, product, and PR). Builds a small business's entire digital layer end to end — website, integrated CRM, and AI/workflow automation — with no agency handoffs or integration gaps. Works remotely; founder based in Lisbon; English and Português.

## Services
- [Websites](https://cardinal.studio/services.html): Fast, conversion-built sites coded from scratch, with every form and CTA writing straight into the CRM.
- [Integrated CRM](https://cardinal.studio/services.html): A client database modelled around how the business works — contacts, deals, history, stages — living inside the same system as the site.
- [AI Automation & Integrations](https://cardinal.studio/services.html): AI and API integrations that draft follow-ups, summarise enquiries, route leads, and sync the tools the business already runs.
- [Workflow & Calendar Automation](https://cardinal.studio/services.html): Automated follow-ups, reminders, and booking, so a new lead is logged, acknowledged, and slotted toward the calendar without manual steps.

## Why one builder
- One technical person designs, builds, and wires the entire product — no agency handoffs, no integration gaps between vendors.
- Six years across game design, full-stack development, product, and PR — requirements are turned into working systems, not brochure pages.
- You talk to the builder directly — no account managers, no unnecessary fees.
- Automation is treated as a core deliverable, not an add-on.

## Coverage
- Remote — worldwide. Founder based in Lisbon, Portugal.
- Languages: English, Português.

- WhatsApp (fastest reply): https://cardinal.studio/contact.html
- Email: hello@cardinal.studio
